anti_overfit_rules: No use of Candidate 004 backtest results to redefine regimes.
Discovery/validation split required before any promotion language.
hypothesis: A portfolio of non-duplicated daily-compatible sleeves may be more robust if a frozen market-regime router decides which sleeve is allowed before trades are generated.

sleeves.candidate_003_change: regime-gated because standalone contribution was negative
sleeves.name: Mean Reversion
sleeves.role: recovery/range sleeve only in allowed regimes

sleeves.name: Defensive/Low-Vol
sleeves.role: daily-compatible stabilizer when risk is high or trend is quiet

sleeves.name: Cash/No-Trade
sleeves.role: explicit no-position sleeve for hostile regimes
